sentences.arabic: كَتَبَتْ رَنِيمُ قَائِمَةً بِمَهَامِّهَا فِي بِدَايَةِ كُلِّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ranim je na početku svakog dana pisala popis zadataka.
sentences.translationEn: Ranim wrote a list of her tasks at the beginning of every day.

sentences.translation: Počinjala je s najvažnijim zadacima prvo.
sentences.translationEn: She started with the most important tasks first.

sentences.arabic: شَطَبَتْ كُلَّ مَهَمَّةٍ بَعْدَ الِانْتِهَاءِ مِنْهَا.
sentences.translation: Precrtavala je svaki zadatak nakon što ga završi.
sentences.translationEn: She crossed out each task after finishing it.

sentences.arabic: فِي نِهَايَةِ الْيَوْمِ أَنْهَتْ كُلَّ مَهَامِّهَا وَشَعَرَتْ بِرَاحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju dana je završila sve zadatke i osjetila se smireno.
sentences.translationEn: At the end of the day she finished all her tasks and felt relieved.
